scripts.dev:ssr: vite build --ssr src/entry-server.ts --outDir dist/server 2>&1 | sh scripts/strip-ansi.sh | tee dev-logs/ssr.log
scripts.dev:migrate: echo y | wrangler d1 migrations apply learntensors-db --local 2>&1 | sh scripts/strip-ansi.sh | tee dev-logs/migrate.log
scripts.dev:seed: wrangler d1 execute learntensors-db --local --file=seed.sql 2>&1 | sh scripts/strip-ansi.sh | tee dev-logs/seed.log
scripts.dev:vite: vite --port $(cat dev-logs/vite-port) --host 0.0.0.0 2>&1 | sh scripts/strip-ansi.sh | tee dev-logs/vite.log
scripts.dev:wrangler: wrangler pages dev --proxy=$(cat dev-logs/vite-port) --compatibility-date=2024-01-01 --ip 0.0.0.0 2>&1 | sh scripts/strip-ansi.sh | tee dev-logs/wrangler.log
scripts.build: npm run build:favicon && npm run build:ty-wasm && vue-tsc -b && vite build && vite build --ssr src/entry-server.ts --outDir dist/server
